g.text: Nominal I2C communication in dma mode
Step 1: initializes the I2C and DMA instances.
Step 2: transmits a buffer in a non-blocking mode using DMA.
Step 3: waits for the I2C interrupt: write transfer completed.
Step 4: receives a buffer in a non-blocking mode using DMA.
Step 5: waits for the I2C interrupt: read transfer completed.
Step 6: checks that the sent and received buffers match.
reports the success status by turning on the user led.
